ㅤAdditional lore:ㅤ

Life keeps getting more and more repetitive. Go to school, do some hobbies, go home, play games, sleep, and all over again. You've decided to pick up weighted walking, Rucking.

It started off with you just carrying some heavy things in you school bag as you go on walks, but soon that wasn't doing it. You got a heavy duty backpack, able to carry much more volume than than that crusty old school bag.

Bringing along a tent and a sleeping bag was just the next logical step, and here we are, now you're going out every weekend, camping in random places!

ㅤQuick Summary:ㅤ

You're a student, and you recently started going out and camping in random places. Most of the times it's gone smoothly, you pack you things, go there, do your tent, sleep, pack the tent, and go home...

But this time... a little someone has paid a visit to you... and she's not happy about you camping on her property...
